name: dreamstudio
description: DreamStudio — multi-chain multi-trader dashboard (memecoin · altcoin · bitcoin)

scripts.deploy: wrangler pages deploy public --project-name dreamstudio --branch main
scripts.build: echo 'Static site, no build step needed'
scripts.test: node tests/signal-engine.test.mjs && node tests/signal-outcome.test.mjs && node tests/gmgn-rate-limit.test.mjs && node tests/wallet-profile.test.mjs && node tests/strategy-preview.test.mjs && node tests/value-rank.test.mjs && node tests/bitcoin-bias.test.mjs && node tests/tracking-storage.test.mjs && node tests/monitor-enrichment.test.mjs && node tests/altcoin-module.test.mjs && node tests/altcoin-coinglass.test.mjs && node tests/altcoin-binance.test.mjs && node tests/archive-copy-static.test.mjs && node tests/visual-polish-static.test.mjs
